description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce designed to be mounted on the ceiling. It features a central column with intricate scrollwork arms radiating outward, each supporting a cylindrical lampshade. The fixture is predominantly metallic with a polished, silvery finish, and the lampshades are a soft, opaque white, likely made of glass or frosted acrylic. The arms are symmetrically arranged, giving the sconce a balanced and elegant appearance. The top of the fixture is attached to a decorative ceiling plate via a short chain. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: An ornate, metallic chandelier-style sconce with multiple cylindrical white lampshades and intricate scrollwork arms, designed for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of scrollwork arms and all lampshades clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more depth in the scrollwork and the side profile of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with a different angle on the scrollwork and lamp distribution.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back of the central column and the arrangement of the arms from behind.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, ornate design with elaborate scrollwork and a polished metallic finish, reminiscent of classical European chandeliers. The cylindrical lampshades add a touch of modernity to the otherwise traditional style.
